features: FIZZ TIME: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak.
DELICIOUSLY SCENTED: Enjoy the fabulous scent of a gentle rose whilst relaxing in a warm bath.
BATH TRIO: Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs, enjoy multiple silky smooth gentle rose scented baths.

BUBBLE FREE: Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the gentle rose fragrance. Relax and enjoy.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Resealable bag. Ready to use, triple pack.
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak. Enjoy the fabulous scent of a gentle rose whilst relaxing in a warm bath. Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs, enjoy multiple silky smooth gentle rose scented baths. Prefer the prefect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the gentle rose fragrance, relax and enjoy. Ready to use, rose fragranced in a resealable bag 450g. Directions Drop the bath bomb in a bathtub full of water Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Use only as directed. Manufacturer Contact Information Elysium Spa Rose Bath Bombs 3 pack See more
